package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for handler_calls_repository_directly_without_service: Handlers that bypass a visible service layer and call repositories or query helpers directly for business orchestration.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: warning.
type Rule071NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule071NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule071NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario071Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule071NegativeService, input Rule071NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
